results.title: “He deserves this trophy” – Marc Cucurella pays tribute to Man City’s Rodri after World Cup Golden Ball win
results.description: Marc Cucurella has paid tribute to Man City’s Rodri following his Golden Ball win at the FIFA World CupSpain beat Argentina 1-0 in Sunday’s final to win their second FIFA World Cup titleCucurella ...

results.title: IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: Javier Bardem celebrates Spain winning 2026 FIFA World Cup
results.description: The Spanish actor was among the celebrities in attendance at the final held at the New York New Jersey Stadium in New Jersey on Sunday, with the Spaniards claiming victory over Argentina 1-0 in extra time. Following the thrilling match, Bardem took to Instagram to post a photo of himself standing next to player Borja Iglesias, who held the FIFA World Cup Trophy. "A group of players who represent the diversity of Spain and respect the rights of groups and people who need a voice," he wrote in the caption.

results.title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com: What to know
results.description: Scott Melker discusses Citadel Securities' latest investment of $400 million in cryptocurrency exchange Crypto.com. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

results.title: They are now on the TV, but could these former athletes win today?
